characters.name: Airport Check-In Staff
characters.description: Airport Check-In StaffBiographical informationFamilyN/APhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBehind the scenesDebutThe Photograph The unnamed Airport Check-In Staff Member is one of the airport service agents who checks for photographs on passengers’ passports. He is kind and gentle for passengers with their photos on their passports.

characters.name: Archaeologist
characters.description: ArchaeologistBiographical informationFriendsThe Thieves(working with him once)Dig Site Security GuardEnemiesMr. BeanPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleLocationUnited KingdomBehind the scenesDebutBean's BountyPortrayed byJon Glover  TheArchaeologistis a one time character who only once Appeared inBean's Bounty. He's a hardworking person and focused on studying the artifacts, and skeletons of the people from the past. He studies it's origins, and age. He hates being interrupted or disturbed by other people, when he's working on something important.

characters.name: Arnie the Waiter
characters.description: Arnie the WaiterBiographical informationFriendsRestaurant OwnerThe ChefPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleLocationRestaurant La CuisineBehind the scenesDebutRestaurantPortrayed byJon Glover(Season 1 and Season 2)Jonathan Kydd(Season 3) Arnie[1]the Waiteris a minor character inMr. Bean: The Animated Series. He is the waiter atRestaurant La Cuisine. He is a waiter who takes people's order and serving the dish. He slips on the water and the soup and the escargots fell in his face after Mr. Bean squeezed the water out of Teddy, wetting the floor in the process. Because of his accident, he is sent to the hospital for treatment. With his only waiter hospitalized, theRestaurant Owneris worried and goes back inside the restaurant. Bean tries to order but the owner denies his order and forces him to become the substitute waiter as punishment for wetting the floor and injuring the waiter. He's calm and gentle towards people when they order on the menu.
characters.personality_section: He's calm and gentle towards people when they order on the menu.

He wears large, white t-shirt with hair on his chest, and dark blue trousers with black shoes.

characters.name: Birthday Party's Security Guard
characters.description: Birthday Party's Security GuardBiographical informationFriendsMrs. WicketMr. BeanGuestsLikeHis friends, invitationsDislikeGuests entering without invitationsEnemiesMr. Bean (formerly)Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleLocationLondon, EnglandBehind the scenesDebutBirthday PartyPortrayed byJonathan Kydd  The unnamedBirthday Party's Security Guardis the main antagonist of the episodeBirthday PartyofMr. Bean. He is the security guard of a birthday party who asks for invitation from guests so they can enter. If a person has no invitation, they can't enter. He is usually strict, following the rule of no invitation, no entry even though Bean lives upstairs and knows Wicket. He becomes friendly to Bean when he realizes he was the birthday celebrant all along.
characters.personality_section: He is usually strict, following the rule of no invitation, no entry even though Bean lives upstairs and knows Wicket. He becomes friendly to Bean when he realizes he was the birthday celebrant all along.

characters.name: Bobby McDim
characters.description: Bobby McDimSeason 4Season 2-3Season 1Biographical informationFriendsPolice Sergeant OfficerPolice OfficersMr. Bean(At times)DislikeCrimeEnemiesGazArt SnatcherGame Console ThiefPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBehind the scenesDebutBean's BountyPortrayed byGary Martin Police OfficersMr. Bean(At times) Art SnatcherGame Console Thief He is a police officer, and an assistant to thePolice Sergeant Officer. He is portrayed as a calm, somewhat shy, and fair officer, but sometimes stern. True to his surname, McDim is somewhat clumsy and airheaded, but far from incompetent. In "Wicket's Driving Lesson", he is shown to be somewhat sarcastic.
